item.title: Gained weight and love myself
item.description:
Skinny but mentally I was miserable,obsessing over my weight constantly.
2 years Gained 30 pounds and I’ve never loved myself more!

item.title: A Stolen Vid Collection
item.description:
It's MOSTLY cats. . . . Mostly. - But this is the laziest coworker ever.
Same.
Just the two of us~
He has a lot to say.
You saw it coming.
BAP!
Shake it!!
Teaching very, very tolerant cats
Gotta make sure you get fed properly when you're a fat cat~ Okay admittedly this was just because I wanted to clear up a little space and wanted to make sure I had them.
item.dc:creator: Frozenaccess
